name: codex-dynamic-workflows-lab
description: Coordinate bounded local Codex workflows from a skill and MCP server.

interface.longDescription: Turn deterministic workflow scripts into bounded local Codex jobs, then validate, submit, track, cancel, and read their artifacts through a local MCP server. Includes experimental route profiles, compact context forwarding, and benchmark preflight helpers for read-only, reviewable orchestration.
defaultPrompt: Use bounded dynamic workflows to run a read-only parallel repository review
